features.title: Fix evaluator codex scope
features.description: Remove the documentation-only exemption from evaluator.md that allows skipping codex adversarial review. The exemption should only apply when there are literally zero changed files.
steps: Open plugins/harness/skills/harness/roles/evaluator.md
Verify the documentation-only exemption for codex review has been removed
Confirm the exemption now only applies when there are zero changed files
Verify no other skip conditions were accidentally introduced
features.notes: Small targeted edit -- grouped with F-012 in Sprint 1

features.title: Build harness-companion.mjs entry point and lib modules
features.description: Create plugins/harness/scripts/harness-companion.mjs as the single entry point with subcommand dispatch, plus five library modules under plugins/harness/scripts/lib/ (state.mjs, features.mjs, git.mjs, artifacts.mjs, progress.mjs). Subcommands: feature-select, state-mutate, auto-commit, validate-artifacts, progress-append, check-stop, cleanup-sprints. Zero npm dependencies.
steps: Verify plugins/harness/scripts/harness-companion.mjs exists and is executable
Verify all five lib modules exist under plugins/harness/scripts/lib/
Run node plugins/harness/scripts/harness-companion.mjs --help and confirm subcommand list
Verify JSON output to stdout and human-readable errors to stderr
Verify exit codes: 0 success, 1 user error, 2 system error
Verify zero npm dependencies -- only Node.js built-ins used
features.notes: Main deliverable -- approximately 250 lines total across entry point and lib modules

features.title: Wire scripts into hooks and update role docs
features.description: Update hooks.json to call harness-companion.mjs subcommands instead of inline Node one-liners. Update session.md and coordinator.md to instruct agents to call scripts for mechanical steps.
steps: Verify hooks.json calls harness-companion.mjs instead of inline one-liners
Verify session.md references script subcommands for mechanical steps
Verify coordinator.md references script calls for state management, feature selection, and auto-commit
Confirm no inline state management instructions remain in updated docs
features.notes: Depends on F-012 -- scripts must exist before wiring

features.title: End-to-end verification
features.description: Run script subcommands against real harness artifacts to confirm feature-select returns valid JSON with dependency resolution, state-mutate updates atomically, validate-artifacts reports correctly, and progress-append produces well-formed entries.
steps: Run feature-select and verify valid JSON with correct dependency resolution
Run state-mutate --set-phase contract and verify state.json updated atomically
Run validate-artifacts --round 1 and verify correct missing/present report
Run progress-append and verify well-formed progress.md entry
Run check-stop and verify correct stop-condition output
Run auto-commit in dry-run or verify correct git command construction
features.notes: Verification gate -- confirms integration works before shipping
